name_en: New Small Bucket Bag, Imported Bursting Sheepskin, Color: Vintage Silver, Size: 15*17*19
name_cn:
New Small Bucket Bag, Imported Bursting Sheepskin, Color: Vintage Silver, Size: 15*17*19
Balenciaga Paris's latest LeCagole bucket bag comes with a heart-shaped mirror and a card holder, which is so cool 🆒
